payload.answer: I can identify this as a request to inspect memory mem_123, but I cannot explain or evaluate the memory because the actual memory record was not included in the provided context.

entity_resolution.reason: The request references memory ID mem_123, but no memory record contents or retrieval result were provided in the input.

details: No memory card was generated because the referenced memory content is unavailable.
No current facts about mem_123 were inferred beyond the existence of the inspection request.

repair_options: Provide the full /brain inspect memory mem_123 output.
Retry the inspection request with the memory record contents included.
If mem_123 was deleted or superseded, provide its lifecycle metadata so it can be explained without presenting it as current.
